description: List notebooks on the Open Notebook server, optionally filtering by archived status (GET /api/notebooks).
rules: read-only: only GETs from the server
writes the notebook list JSON to record_store/notebooks.json
degrades gracefully (status=unreachable, exit 0) when the server is down
usage: Set OPEN_NOTEBOOK_URL (NB_ARCHIVED 'true'/'false', default false). Output: notebooks.json.
limitation: Requires a reachable Open Notebook server with the requests package.
